title: Modelo de Datos
content: Modelo de Datos - Entidades: User, Crop, Lot, Event, EventType. Relaciones: User 1:N Event, Crop 1:N Lot, Lot 1:N Event.

title: Seguridad y Autenticacion
content: Seguridad JWT: Login -> token -> requests con Bearer token. Roles: ADMIN, OPERATOR, VIEWER. Config: 24h expiration, BCrypt password.

title: Configuracion del Proyecto
content: Config: Backend (application.properties), Frontend (.env). Scripts: npm start/build/test. Herramientas: Node 18+, Angular 21, Java 17+, Maven 3.9+, PostgreSQL 15+.

title: Flujo de Git y Branching
content: Ramas: main (prod), develop (integracion), feature/US-123, bugfix/fix-xxx. Conventional commits: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test.

title: Proceso de Code Review
content: Checklist: tests pasan, formateado, sin debug, sin hardcode. Criterios: funciona, conventions, coverage, validacion, seguridad. Reglas: no self-merge, 1 reviewer.

title: Proceso de Release
content: Versionado: vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. Entornos: Dev, Staging, Production. Flujo: release branch -> tests -> merge main -> tag -> deploy. Checklist: CI, version, docs, QA.

title: Guia de Contribucion
content: Contribuir: Report bugs (Issue), Sugerir features (Issue), Pull Requests. Estandares: ESLint/Prettier, TypeScript strict, funciones pequenas, conventional commits.
